Inspector of Electricity, Group-A (Gazetted) in the office of the Chief Electrical Inspector, Mumbai under the control of
Mr. Sanjay Shankar Rathore, Electrical Inspector, Cadre, was given the rank of Column No. Shown in 3.
Periodical in the interest of public service and administrative convenience with the approval of the competent authorities in office.
A transfer is being made.
2. The officers transferred by the Chief Electrical Inspector, Mumbai to their place of transfer expeditiously.
Immediate discharge from the current position by making the necessary local alternate arrangements for taking charge.
Do so and ask them to join the replacement immediately.

5. The above column no. Additional charge of posts vacant by transfer of officers in 1
The proposal for handing over should be submitted to the government immediately.
6. Leave of the officer concerned shall not be granted for any reason except with the previous sanction of the Government. As well,
Transferred by original office as per Rule-30 (c) of the Maharashtra Civil Services (Leave) Rules, 1981
No leave applications of officers shall be entertained. If such an application is received, it is original to the relevant authorities.
Payments must be returned by post to the registered address.
7. In case of non-acquisition of office immediately or under any kind of pressure under the said order.
The Maharashtra Civil Service (Conduct) is responsible for the cancellation and alteration of transfers.
Being in violation of Rule 23 of the Rules 1979, it is considered misconduct and is against them.
The concerned should note that action will be taken in the matter.
8. Also, the transferred officers mentioned in the above table are competent under the Transfer Act.
Non-compliance with an order passed with the consent of the authorities is a serious matter.
The officer conducting the departmental inquiry under section 2. 1 (2) (v) of section 2 of the Rules of Procedure, 1991.
Will be eligible for suspension proceedings.
9. Compliance by the concerned Electricity Inspector, Group-A at the new place of appointment with immediate effect.
The report should be submitted to the government without fail through the Chief Electricity Inspector, Mumbai.
The said Government Order is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra, www.maharashtra.gov.in.
